reviews.review_title: The game is good, but there are issues.
reviews.review_description:
I really like this game since its fnaf and cool, and everything else & I really like the details. I rate it 4 stars because there are some issues.

The intro is too long around 5-10 minutes depending how you do, I recommend removing the double check scene, make it that after bringing the parts to the back of your car, you enter your car and it doesnt work, then you get jumpscared, but if that's a little bit too hard, then just keep the double check part. Don't got to but it would be recommended!

Whoever made this game you did a pretty good job, Can't wait for more nights

good multiplayer and it’s free rome 

five stars
